name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Step-by-step guide to correctly perform Jumping Jacks.
common_mistakes: Avoid improper form when doing Jumping Jacks.
benefits: Improves strength and endurance in the Core area.

regression_level: Try easier version of Jumping Jacks.
